title: Measuring the net present value of further education in England
body: "The analytical report provides estimates of the economic return from qualifications in further education using the most recent data on labour market outcomes. This economic return is known as the net present value (NPV).  The annex contains the:   key model inputs including achievement rates, costs and guided learning hours for classroom-based provision and off-the-job training hours for apprenticeships report tables   Measuring the net present value of further education 2018 to 2019 is also available. "

taxons.title: Further and higher education, skills and vocational training
